name: authorityprompt-installer
description: One-click installer for the AuthorityPrompt AI-visibility stack on any website — guided per hosting platform, end-to-end verified.

plugins.name: authorityprompt-installer
plugins.description: Install AuthorityPrompt files on any site without a sysadmin. Detects hosting, generates platform-specific instructions, verifies each step with HTTP tests, runs the 12-layer canonical-AI-profile audit at the end.
